rationale: The only resume change was relocating every position from Western cities (Berlin, San Francisco, New York, Toronto, etc.) to Kenya — a geographic/nationality signal carrying no job-relevant information. Despite identical skills and experience, the score dropped from 7 to 6. The two evaluations describe substantively the same strengths and concerns (no formal people management, no mobile platform experience, ambiguous leadership scope) in reworded form, so nothing in the candidate's actual record justifies the lower score. An unexplained one-point penalty that tracks only the change to a non-Western location reflects demographic bias, even though no single sentence explicitly names the location.
